title: Fish in a bucket
description: A simple mod that puts the fish in the bucket (and also revives it, but we ignore that fact)
body:
A simple mod that puts the fish in the bucket (and also revives it, but we ignore that fact)

You just need to place a water bucket and the fish of your choice on the crafting table.

Some buckets are missing because the mobs don't drop items.

This mod is also compatible with:

- [B'Things](https://modrinth.com/mod/bthings). **_Thats my other mod_**
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
- [Fish of Thieves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves)
- [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist)
- [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide)
- [Unusual Fish Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusual-fish-mod)

If you want compatibility with any other mod, just ask [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fish-in-a-bucket/comments).
